summary: Iteration 33: Backend-only testing for hub context caching integration. All 20 tests passed. Verified roleplay/batch/chat runs work with caching, cache invalidation on instance update/delete, and no regressions on hub API endpoints.
critical_code_review_comments: hub_cache.py: Well-implemented MongoDB-based context cache with TTL indexes and proper cache key generation using SHA256 hash of instance config + thread timestamp
Cache key includes instance_updated_at and thread_updated_at for automatic invalidation when instance or thread changes
purge_instance_context_cache correctly called in v1_hub.py on instance update (PATCH) and delete (DELETE)
In-run cache (in_run_context_cache dict) prevents redundant DB lookups within a single run execution
Exception handling in _build_slot_context gracefully falls back to computing context if cache read/write fails

test_credentials.note: Guest flow used with X-Guest-Id header - unique guest ID per test to avoid quota limits

seed_data_creation: Test instances/groups created and cleaned up within tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hub context caching is fully operational. Cache collection 'hub_context_cache' exists with proper indexes (unique compound index on user_id+instance_id+cache_key, TTL index on expires_at). Cache entries have 30-minute TTL. Roleplay, batch, and chat runs all use the caching layer correctly.

health_and_ready_endpoints.details: /api/health returns ok, /api/ready returns ready with mongo check passing

hub_instances_crud.details: List, create, get detail, update, archive, delete all working. Update and delete trigger cache purge.

hub_runs_no_regression.details: List runs and hub options endpoints working correctly

context_cache_integration.details: Instance with full context fields (role_preset, context, instance_prompt, history_window_messages) created successfully. Instance history endpoint working.

batch_run_with_caching.details: Fan-out batch run executed successfully with caching. Cache entries created in hub_context_cache collection.

roleplay_run_with_caching.details: Roleplay run with player and DM instances executed successfully. Context caching used for both player and DM contexts.

chat_prompt_with_caching.details: Chat prompt to single instance executed successfully with caching.

invalidation_triggers: Thread message changes (via thread_updated_at in cache key)

mocked_apis.details: No mocked APIs - all tests use real backend endpoints

notes: All caching features working as designed
Cache entries verified in MongoDB with correct structure and TTL
In-run cache (in_run_context_cache dict) prevents redundant lookups within single run
Exception handling ensures graceful fallback if cache operations fail
